hooks.command: bash -lc 'repo=$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"); terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "${repo:-(no name)} のタスクが完了しました。" -contentImage ~/.claude/claude.png -execute "osascript ~/.claude/scripts/focus_code.scpt \"${repo}\""'

bash -lc 'dir="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; if [ -n "$dir" ] && git -C "$dir" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && ! git -C "$dir" diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null; then byobu new-window -n vimdiff-review "cd $dir && git difftool -y -x \"vim -d --cmd \\\"let g:loaded_diffchar=1\\\"\" HEAD; exec bash"; fi'

bash -lc 'repo=$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"); terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "${repo:-(no name)} について質問があります。" -contentImage ~/.claude/claude.png -execute "osascript ~/.claude/scripts/focus_code.scpt \"${repo}\""'

customInstructions:
## Global Project Guidelines

See ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md for complete global guidelines.

### Key Rules:
- Always use `uv` for Python (e.g., `uv run python`, `uv pip install`)
- Use `logger` instead of `print()` in production code
- Integrate new scripts into `__main__.py` as CLI subcommands
- Stop and ask for guidance when stuck in error loops (2+ same errors)
- Never commit data files without explicit approval
